calendar.matters:
Petition To Modify Trusts
Off Calendar Nov-30-2010 Off Calendar

Petition To Modify Trusts
Off Calendar Oct-13-2010 Continued To Nov-30-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kenneth Horowitz for Lance Lee.

The Court expressed concern about the petition, stated that the Children's interest needed to be represented, that outright distribution was going to change, that the amount of interests were different and that it was up to the Attorney to determine if one or more Guardian Ad Litem are needed. The matter was continued to November 30, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel is to contact Pam Meyers (Probate Examiner) once he has conferred with his Clients.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

Petition To Modify Trusts
Off Calendar Sep-29-2010 Continued To Oct-13-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kenneth Horowitz for Lance Lee.

Counsel explained how many trusts were established, who the Trustee was, the reasons why the Trustors chose to set up the trusts in such manner, spoke of tax savings and presented oral argument to support his position. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition To Modify Trusts
Off Calendar Aug-18-2010 Continued To Sep-01-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
